message:
fix(ntm): escape double quotes in cask caveats block (ntm#98)

The caveats strings contained unescaped double quotes, producing
invalid Ruby and breaking `brew install --cask ntm`.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -36,9 +36,9 @@
   caveats do
     "To enable shell integration, add to your shell rc file:"
     ""
-    "  eval "$(ntm init zsh)"   # for zsh"
-    "  eval "$(ntm init bash)"  # for bash"
-    "  eval "$(ntm init fish)"  # for fish"
+    "  eval \"$(ntm init zsh)\"   # for zsh"
+    "  eval \"$(ntm init bash)\"  # for bash"
+    "  eval \"$(ntm init fish)\"  # for fish"
     ""
     "Run 'ntm tutorial' to get started!"
   end
